title: Home - Asian American Federation
desc: The Asian American Federation's mission is to raise the influence and well-being of the pan-Asian community through research, policy advocacy, public awareness and non-profit support.

THERE WERE
2,625
REPORTED INCIDENTS OF
ANTI-ASIAN HATE FROM
MARCH 2020 TO JUNE 2021
AAF is fighting these attacks against our
communities with the Hope Against Hate Campaign
to bring immediate safety to Asian New Yorkers.
For latest updates or if you’d like to join the campaign, click below.

NY Daily News: New York City must get mental health help to people of color
What is a regular day like at the Asian
American Federation? Watch our video.
  This video allows you a glimpse of the work
we do with our member organizations
in NYC to create a more equitable city.

The Asian American Federation’s mission is to raise the influence and well-being of the pan-Asian American community through research, policy advocacy, public awareness and organizational development.
